/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,core.so -o ../../../Debug/system/core.so CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/bitflags.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/compat.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/core.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/environment.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/random.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/term.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/time.c.o CMakeFiles/luasystem.dir/luasystem/src/wcwidth.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/ptusa_main/ptusa_main/build-debug/Debug ../../../Debug/liblua.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a
